scripts.postinstall: node --input-type=module -e "import { copyFileSync, existsSync } from 'fs'; const src = 'node_modules/tinyexec/dist/main.mjs'; const dest = 'node_modules/tinyexec/dist/main.js'; if (existsSync(src)) { copyFileSync(src, dest); console.log('✅ tinyexec fix applied'); } else { console.log('⚠️ tinyexec not found'); }"
